particulars.description: Fixed and floating charge over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future, including goodwill, uncalled capital, stocks shares and other securities, buildings, fixtures, fixed plant & machinery. See image for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
